requirement_source: PRD: orvex-studio-lib (slug fG2jKeRGiu, draft) — FR-L1..L30 incl. FR-L12a + NFR-L1..L7; Architecture: orvex-studio-lib (slug 0NPvDR3C0m, canonical) supplies the A-* decisions and the §3 auth-verifier V1..V12 contract

epics.title: [EPIC] lib: pkg/auth — the family security ceiling (dual-IdP verifier, deny-by-default scope, cell apparatus)

stories.title: [lib] pkg/auth: dual-IdP multi-issuer JWKS verify → canonical principal (+ cell-claim parse)
[lib] pkg/auth: bounded introspection client + fail-closed hard staleness wall
[lib] pkg/auth: push-revocation deny-list handler (Redis-backed, exp-driven, tenant-keyed)
[lib] pkg/auth: RequireFresh no-grace introspection for high-privilege routes
[lib] pkg/auth: deny-by-default scope-gate + WorkloadIdentityOnly + cell-guard 421 router
[lib] pkg/auth/authtest: shipped conformance suite as three-way release gate
[lib] pkg/auth: outbound api-key credential helper with rotation

epics.title: [EPIC] lib: pkg/events — CloudEvents envelope, catalog types, publisher, orvexcell cell stamp

stories.title: [lib] pkg/events: CloudEvents envelope helpers + orvexcell stamp + fail-closed consume
[lib] pkg/events: generated event-type constants + payload types (thin/rich profiles)
[lib] pkg/events: publisher helper to studio-spine Broker with retries + OTel propagation

epics.title: [EPIC] lib: typed fail-closed clients (engine / knowledge / billing / identity)

stories.title: [lib] pkg/engineclient: typed engine primitives (chokepoint, ACL, export, quota-status)
[lib] pkg/engineclient: F-QUOTA 402 as first-class terminal non-retryable error
[lib] pkg/engineclient: narrow-never-widen ACL typing + client discipline (deadlines/retries/breaker)
[lib] pkg/knowledgeclient: query plane (Query/Retrieve/Related/Duplicates/AttachmentsSearch)
[lib] pkg/knowledgeclient: opaque epoch-bearing projection-delta cursor client
[lib] pkg/knowledgeclient: rebuild step-API types + client (namespace/walk/index-batch/alias-swap)
[lib] pkg/billingclient: fail-closed entitlements read (plans/quotas SoR)
[lib] pkg/identityclient: introspect/mint/lifecycle-mirror (two-unrelated-types guarantee)

epics.title: [EPIC] lib: pkg/temporalutil — the D-WF-1 split (central worker helpers + satellite step-API server)

stories.title: [lib] pkg/temporalutil/worker: workflows-only worker/activity helpers + D-WF-1 import ban
[lib] pkg/temporalutil/stepapi: idempotency replay + typed error envelope + constant-200 opt-in

epics.title: [EPIC] lib: pkg/obs + pkg/kafkautil — house observability and Kafka-first raw-topic plumbing

stories.title: [lib] pkg/obs: one Setup() OTLP wiring + /healthz+/livez cell echo (CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME)
[lib] pkg/obs: HTTP server middleware + client transports for end-to-end trace stitching
[lib] pkg/kafkautil: assigned consumers + epoch:offset cursors + cell-scoped topics

epics.title: [EPIC] lib: pkg/dfm — clean-room DfM↔ProseMirror serializer (AGPL boundary)

stories.title: [lib] pkg/dfm: AGPL-provenance audit gate of the legacy docmost-cli serializer (WS-11 pre-task)
[lib] pkg/dfm: four-function clean-room serializer + opaque-node round-trip handles
[lib] pkg/dfm: CI parity gate vs engine catalog + expanded contracts golden corpus

epics.title: [EPIC] lib: library engineering — codegen pin, versioning, CI gates, AGPL guard, offline fakes

stories.title: [lib] codegen: pinned gen/ trees + regen-diff CI gate (no hand-editing generated code)
[lib] versioning: single module, semver tags, v0 window, apidiff compile-compat
[lib] library shape: no cmd/Dockerfile, heavy-SDK package confinement, aggregate CI
[lib] AGPL-import CI guard (no @docmost/* or AGPL lineage anywhere in the module)
[lib] offline testability: fakes/test doubles shipped by every package
